stemHtml: Which of these statements about boundary layers is correct?

options.a: Compared with a turbulent boundary layer, a laminar boundary layer is better able to resist a positive pressure gradient before it separates.
options.b: A laminar boundary layer is thicker than a turbulent one.
options.c: A turbulent boundary layer produces less friction drag than a laminar one.
options.d: A laminar boundary layer turns into a turbulent one at the transition point.
